issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringTurn' (or similar current-turn-only), not 'EndOfTurn'. Text says 'during this turn' which means the power loss lasts only for the current turn, not until end of turn. This is a temporal distinction violation.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect looks at 5 cards, reveals up to 1 Alabasta card, and places the rest at the bottom of the deck in any order. Current DSL only captures the search action but omits the deck manipulation (placing non-selected cards at bottom in chosen order). This requires additional action(s) or enhanced parameters to fully represent the effect.
